name: May - Prey (Vore)
description:
Predator POV, possible vore.

May is partially inspired by Dess! Have fun running her over with your trucks.

Eh, rabbit for dinner I guess.

Content warning: Vore. :)

Art/character was made by my friend October AKA Pumpkin! 🎃🎃🎃 I just did all the writing and some of the LOREEE. Wait, did I just do a copy paste of the description of August with minimal changes?

Extra credit to: The air I am breathing, the curly fries October got me and the bottle of water on my desk I will never drink.
creator: MlopBlucket
